back_translation: Why do the nations rage, and the peoples devise useless schemes?
The kings of the earth set themselves up, and the rulers conspire together against the LORD and against His anointed one.
'Let us break the chains of the two of them, and fling their cords away from us.'
He who is enthroned in heaven laughs; the Lord mocks them.
Then He will speak to them in His anger, and terrify them in His fierce wrath.
'As for Me, I have installed My king on Zion, My holy mountain.'
I will proclaim the decree of the LORD. He said to me, 'You are My son; today I have begotten you.
Ask of Me, and I will give the nations as your inheritance, and the ends of the earth as your possession.
You will break them with an iron scepter; you will shatter them like a potter's clay vessel.'
Now therefore, O kings, be wise; be admonished, O judges of the earth.
Serve the LORD with fear, and rejoice with trembling.
Kiss the son, lest He be angry and you perish in the way, for His wrath will flare up in an instant. Happiness belongs to all who take refuge in Him.
